creator: twm@pdp11.pw
text: The package mirror pkg0.cyb.freebsd.org hasn't received updates for most of October. As of Nov 5th it seems to be up-to-date again, but some directories are inaccessible, returning a "403 forbidden" (e.g. http://pkg0.cyb.freebsd.org/FreeBSD:12:amd64/latest/), thus causing errors on the user side when the pkg command uses this mirror.
